allow: PowerShell($env:Path = [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","Machine"\) + ";" + [System.Environment]::GetEnvironmentVariable\("Path","User"\); gh auth status; gh repo list --limit 30)
PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Path "$env:APPDATA\\GitHub CLI", "$env:LOCALAPPDATA\\GitHub CLI", "$env:USERPROFILE\\.config\\gh" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue -Recurse | Select-Object FullName)
PowerShell(where.exe gh 2>&1; Write-Output "---"; & "$env:ProgramFiles\\GitHub CLI\\gh.exe" auth status 2>&1)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\DuyguYilmaz\\Desktop\\dolap benzeri uygulama"; Select-String -Path 'index.html' -Pattern '💚|❤|⭐|🚚|💰|🛡|👥|📍|💬|🤝|🛍|🏷' | ForEach-Object { "{0}: {1}" -f $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.Trim\(\) } | Select-Object -First 40)

PowerShell(Set-Location "C:\\Users\\DuyguYilmaz\\Desktop\\dolap benzeri uygulama"; Select-String -Path 'app.js' -Pattern '💚|❤|⭐|🚚|💰|🛡|👥|📍|💬|🤝|🛍|🏷|🛒|✅|❌|🔔' | ForEach-Object { "{0}: {1}" -f $_.LineNumber, $_.Line.Trim\(\) } | Select-Object -First 50)
